snippet.title: Murungakkai Chips - Talku Lessu Worku Moreu Lyric | Shanthnu Bhagyaraj, Athulya Ravi | Dharan Kumar
snippet.description:
Presenting electrified second single #TalkuLessuWorkuMoreu by #SivaangiKrish & #SamVishal in #DharanKumar's melodious music from “Murungakkai Chips” directed by #Srijar produced by #RavindharChandrasekaran 
#Libraproductions and #Firstmanfilms presents “Murungakkai Chips “.

Starring Shanthnu Bhakyaraj, Athulya Ravi, K. Bhagyaraj, Yogi Babu, Mano bala, Madhumitha, Munishkanth and others.

Written & Directed by Srijar
Produced by Libra Ravindhar Chandrasekaran 
Co-produced by First Man films – Sivasubramanian, Saravana priyan.

Song Name: Talku Lessu Work Moreu
Album Name: Murungakkai Chips
Language: Tamil
Vocals: Sivaangi Krish , Sam Vishal
Lyrics: Ku Karthik
Choreography: Robert 
Music: Dharan Kumar 

Musicians Credits 
Song programmed by Raj Kumar Amal  
Indian percussions: Vikram, T.Derick
Acoustic and electric guitars: Bruce lee 
Song recorded @ Studio D 
Mixed by Visakh.n.b@ studio D, Chennai
Mastered by Steve Corrao @ sage audio brentwood USA..

DOP: Ramesh Chakravarthy 
Art Director: Narmadha Veni 
Editor: Jomin 
Lyrics: Ravindhar Chandrasekaran
Choreography: Robert
Costume Designer: Hina, Nivetha Joseph 
Executive Producer: Asokan G
Line Producer: Varun Chandran

Production Manager: Maharajan
Project Executive Managers: Pradeep R Chinna, Kamalakannan. S
Makeup Artist: Rachel Smith
Publicity Design: Chandru Ranganathan (Thandora)
Stills: Raja
PRO: Nikil Murugan

snippet.title: BRINJAL CURRY | Oil Brinjal Curry Recipe Cooking in Village | Eggplant Recipes | Vegetarian Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook our village's favorite vegetarian Recipe. We make the Brinjal Curry recipe before boiling the brinjal in oil. We also call this recipe ennai kaththirikkai.

We use some traditional spices to makes this recipe more delicious and tastiest.

Finally, we enjoy this recipe with our meal. Brinjal Curry is Yummy!

snippet.title: Yaraane (Official Video)  Gur Sidhu | Jassa Dhillon | Nikkesha | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music & Believe Artist Services presents Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Yaraane by Gur Sidhu.

"True love stories never have endings"

Listen to Yaraane on all audio streaming platforms: https://gursidhu.bfan.link/yaraane.yde

Spotify: https://gursidhu.bfan.link/yaraane/spotify

Do Share your feedback in comments.

Track Credits:
Song name: Yaraane
Singer: Gur Sidhu 
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: B Sanj
Guitar By : Shomu Seal
Video:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Nikkesha 
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions

Design Publicity: Roop Kamal Singh
Special Thanks - Big Media

Label : Brown Town Music

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics:

Sade toh sada tu kasoor puchda,
tod k yaraane pahila aap sohnya ,

Hatha diya lika vich tenu Likh k ,
kitta ta ni ma koi paap sohnya ,
Sade toh sada tu kasoor puchda,
Tod k yaraane pahila aap sohnya ,

Kinne jazbaat gehre janda nai tu ve , 
akhri kuash mukke tere naal rooh ve , 
tanya di shatt hetha  sambi bethi pyar ma ,
 jithe aundi gall teri othe jandi haar ve , 
dil vaale panne v ma saare folte ,
pad k tu shad ti kitaab sohnya
Sade toh sada tu kasoor puchda,
Tod k yaraane pahila aap sohnya ,,,

Bada garoor c teri yaari te akhri nu tutt he gya , 
gair ta fer change nikle jassya apna he koi lutt gya, 
zinda  rahe te har roj teri gali cho langa ge , 
pyaar jo kitta sajjna teri mot picho v khair manga ge ,

Shaam vale vele nehre te swere,
 minta v kittiya kade tarle c tere ,
 hun koi v na puche ditti satt teri dukhe ,
 kuj lagda nai changa adi so jaiye pukhe , 
kado sadi yaari vich doori pa gayi , 
fansle na houe satho naap sohnya ,
saade toh sada tu kasoor puchda tod k yaraane pahila aap sohnya 

Sochi ik vaar pawe labb li bazaar,
sab kimta vale milan ge ,
koi lakh te koi hajaar ,
wafa de k v bewaayi mili , 
sanu teri bewaafayi nal v pyaar ,
 jinna sang laayi rabb khair kare,
dua karde aa kade aaye na takraar.

snippet.title: Planting Green tea and Strawberry | Garden Vlog in Tamil
snippet.description:
In this video join me on planting strawberries and green tea plant in the garden. Strawberries are very easy to grow and very fun to harvest. Gardening is a great way to pass time and involve the entire family. I planted the bareroot strawberries and these are June bearing strawberries so their main crop is not out yet and it's really exciting to pick strawberries every morning. I am also very excited about tasting fresh green tea.

Flower:
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07F7XZGTD?psc=1&ref=ppx_pop_dt_b_product_details
Butterfly:

snippet.title: BTS "Butter" - The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
snippet.description:
Global pop icons BTS return to perform their record-smashing new hit, "Butter," ahead of their upcoming livestream event BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO which takes place on June 13th and 14th. If you missed it, scroll back to watch RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook teach Stephen Colbert some new hand gestures in a hilarious Late Show comedy bit! #BTSonLSSC #Butter #BTS

Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube
Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on Twitter: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is the premier late night talk show on CBS, airing at 11:35pm EST, streaming online via Paramount+, and delivered to the International Space Station on a USB drive taped to a weather balloon. Every night, viewers can expect: Comedy, humor, funny moments, witty interviews, celebrities, famous people, movie stars, bits, humorous celebrities doing bits, funny celebs, big group photos of every star from Hollywood, even the reclusive ones, plus also jokes.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3174 - Swimming Pool Mein Meeting! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

snippet.title: Madhavi का Business चल रहा ज़ोर शोर से | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Madhavi Ka Aam Ka Business
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of Gokuldhaam Summer Special:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cQEJPJkWQcRi1-6V6CFSSh3

Madhavi all set on starting her own small business. But this time she is planning on experimenting with her business ideas. Will her business be a success? Let's find out!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.description:
White Hill Dhaakad presents Latest Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hostel Life by "Khasa Aala Chahar". Lyrics written & Composed Khasa Aala Chahar. Music by Bamboo Beats. Directed by Ameet Choudhary. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu.

♪Hungama : https://www.hungama.com/song/hostel-life/66367299/

Operator Codes :

https://wynk.in/music/album/hostel-life/bl_3616555945825
● Set Vi CRBT Click : Vi Subscribers for Caller Tune Direct Dial 53712469736
● BSNL (N & W) Direct Dial : BSNL (N & W) Subscribers Direct Dial   567007495212

Credits :

Song : Hostel Life
Singer/Lyricist/Composer : Khasa Aala Chahar (https://www.instagram.com/khasa_aala_chahar/)
Starring : Khasa Aala Chahar, Priya Soni
Music : Bamboo Beats
Mix/Master  : D Chandu
Dop : Parkash Kumar 
Focus - Boota Ji 
Ad : Ashok Jangra ,Rohit Choudhary , Ashok Sarwata 
Edit/Di : Monti 
Location : Gd Goenka School Hisar
Production : Addi Kalyan
Special Thanks : Khaas Group(Sumit, Rohit, Pardeep, Sidharth, Pony, Mukesh)
Concept/Screenplay/Direction : Ameet Choudhary 
(https://www.instagram.com/ameetchoudhary.in/?utm_medium=copy_link)
Social Media Promotions : HOT (Hub Of Talent)
Produced By : Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu

Lyrics :

1 hostel naam ka pinjra tha jit panchi sare ajad the
Vo beskimti dor tha yaara ne le svaad the
Gateman mahare aadhi the
Re pakae yaar jugadi the
Or game koi khelya na bottle ke yaar khiladi the
Room ke kundi lake ne patiala peg banake ne
Fer jump marke doli te re laage race takake ne

Je munna bolya circuit te
Apun ko baapu dikhta hai
Oye tane kaya toh final se
Bhai dikhta hai toh dikhta hai
Han tdikhta hai bhai dikhta hai
Han tum bhi bolo dikhta hai
Dikhta hai bhai dikhta hai han sare bolo dikhta hai
Je baat samjah main aai na
Mein achi ju samjha dunga
Ya legend life ki kahani saste main kukar gaa dyunga

Koi khaan peen ka daku tha
1 chashme aala padhaku tha
Par 1 bat toh common thi sala sara gang ladaku tha
1 landi yamha yara ki college ke gedhe laave thi
Oh ne dekh dekh sab shocking the
Yaara ke nedhe ave thi
1 dekhi surat pyari thi
Yara ki adhi grari thi
Uske chakra mein chet dia re jiske gela yari thi

Hostel aala ne bhar karya
Fer nakli baapu tyar karya
Yaara ne maafi milgi thi
Emotional atyachar krya 
3 idiot aali situation yaara ke bhitar banri thi
Virus toh nayre paare tha yaari fevicol te judh ri thi
Sab saanjha soda yaara ka
Na kise chij main farak karya
Jo bol dia vo hona tha na fer dobara tark karya

Tera keval mann ka beham se oye
Na din ye laut ke aave se
Chal chod tu khasa aale oye tu kyu ji ne tarsave se
Fursat ke mah aaio re va mehfil fer sajani se
Yaanepan main jo judh gi thi va yari bhi nibhani se
Re legend kathe hovenge jo tatkalin kirdaar the
Tu aaj suni se kahani jo ve mere jigri yaar the
Ooooaaaaaa

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3175 - Kaun Hai Khabri?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

More Useful Links :
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/tmkoc.sabtv
* Follow us on Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmahnfp
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf
* Visit us at : http://www.tmkoc.com

snippet.title: किसे करेगा Jetha Investigate? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3175- 27thMay, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/finding-the-informant-1000118829?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3175: Who Is  The Informer
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and group are in the swimming pool thinking about a new plan. Jethalal suggests they should look for the black marketer's informer in the resort.During the time of discussion Deepti enters to ask them how are they doing to which everyone replies they are having a a lot of fun. Jethalal gets suspicious to know more watch the full episode.
More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Lotte Choco Pie Recipe in Tamil | Choco Pie with Homemade Marshmallow Filling
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make lotte choco pie recipe in tamil. These choco pies have a cake pieces with marshmallow filling in the center and the whole sandwich is covered in chocolate. The soft and fluffy marshmallow center is the highlight of this choco pie. We can make this recipe either in the oven or without oven. But for making the marshmallow it is preferred to use a electric beater to get it soft and spongy.

#ChocoPie #LotteChocoPie

Friends, please do try this choco pie recipe at home and share it with your friends and family. Also please do share your feedback about the recipe in the comments below. All the best and happy cooking!

Ingredients:

For Cake:
1/4 cup unsalted butter
1/4 cup Condensed Milk
2 tbsp Sugar
1 cup Maida
1/2 tsp baking soda
pinch of Salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
5 tbsp Milk

For Marshmallow: 

1 tbsp gelatin
4 tbsp Water
1 cup Sugar
6 tbsp Water
6-7 drops Lemon juice

For Chocolate coating:
100 g Dark chocolate(1/2 cup)
1 tsp Oil

snippet.title: King - Desi Dan Bilzerian | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod by. Section8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅🔥Follow🤴🏾On Instagram🔥✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking


Artist - King
Lyrics By - King
Composed By - King
Music Produced By - Section 8
Mix & Master By - Sshiv
Directed By - Yash Chhabra
Vfx By - Shivam Solanki
& Saksham Bhadani


This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT.
Digitally marketed By Kingsclan Marketing
Edit By Yash Chhabra
Digitally Handled By KingsclanMGMT

Shows,Business and Bookings 🍾🌹
📮kingsclanmgmt@gmail.com

#King​ #desidanbilzerian​ #thegorillabounce

LYRICS:

Jo jante ni unko bhi lagun familiar
Bana main shaq se ni beshaq kahunga clear
Main maal fook’ke na likhun ye budhhi tezz itni
Albumein bana ke fekun ek below na million.

Main mauj kaatu jaise Desi Dan Bilzerian
Jo khaate khar saale baithe aj pavilion
Kal hi shaam esi bandi se mila tha jiska naam peeche kaur par vibe thi Brazilian

Khelein hum aag aur khelte hum raag se,
Ye bachhe kitne bhi bade - bade na baap se,
main naam rashi esi rakhke ghumta hun,
bande kehte kaam karne ka tareeka seekhe apse!

haan khulla khaana,
khud kamana,
khulke jeena,
Jinse milta,
Sab haseena,
Jaise ghumta bahaaron mein.

haan hun kamina,
par nageena,
Leke ghumu,
Har mahina,
Poora saal jaise jeeta hun tyohaaron mein.

Haan thoda papi,
Main gaali deta kaafi,
Par zindagi mein badne ke liye kabhi na chaati..

Teen button se bahar chhati,
Shine maare proud se,
Aur bhaichara rakhe na karte dekhke hum jaati.

Halla kaate poora hum jhund se dara na karte,
Kare fatey poori adhuri jung lada na karte,
Aagaz maar de ajaam se jo pehle
Hum vo kaal beta jinke haath roshini dhara na karte.

Khada ghamand hua to baat kyun baithate ho?
Kamzor dekhke hi haath kyun uthaate ho?
Akele mod di kalai aflatoono ki to duniya humse kehti itna kehke kyu jataate ho?

Jo raaz rakhle aisa raaz kisse raazi hai?
Main haar ke bhi jeeta kheli aisi baazi hai.
Ye Sach pasand nahi to kaan apne karlo band,
Main dheere dheere faadu beta konsi jald baazi hai.

Aankhe band karke bhi main dekhun duniya ko ye duniya gero se bhi zada apno se mari hui
Muthhi khol ke main kya hi lunga apno se jo apno ki hi aankhein mere chehre se jali hui 

Mere haath dono baandh doge jhuthe ilzaamo se to maan lunga gero ke tum saath ho
Magar Har baat ka jawab deta hai ye waqt
Meri baatein kadwi ya tum kitne dil ke saaf ho

Aaj bhi shikand na maathe pe tum dekhoge
Chahe khada akele chaahe kitne piche waar ho.
Bhale manzoor na ho dushmano se haarna
Par dil ke tukde hote hain jab dushmano me
Yaar ho!

Ek din jab pata chalega sach to paer zameenein chhod denge aankhein khud se ruth jayegi
Hum to bethe honge pohoch se bhi door bekhabar tab jaani kadwi hi ye baatein tumko khayengi.

Apna kya hai hum to bande hi hain mood ke
Jaha milega pyaar hum vahi pe dil lootayenge
Humse kya hi paaoge tum dil dukhaake
Hum to iski bhi nazam banaake pyaar loot jayenge.

Teen nashe the pyaare ek aur judh gaya hai,
Tarrakki kehti raja mujhko leke udh gaya hai
Kehti pakad me main na aati ache acho ke
Par tujhme aisa kya hai mera poora dhyaan mudh gaya hai.

Ab kehti haar ka jua bhi jeetega
Main likh ke deti hun zamana tere liye ruk gaya hai

Agar pata chale farak to marz kosega
Main kya hun dava tu khud zeher jo peeke uth gaya hai.

Jo jante ni unko bhi lagun familiar
Bana main shaq se ni beshaq kahunga clear
Main maal fook’ke na likhun ye budhhi tezz itni
Albumein bana ke fekun ek below na million.

Main mauj kaatu jaise Desi Dan Bilzerian
Jo khaate khar saale baithe aj pavilion
Kal hi shaam esi bandi se mila tha jiska naam peeche kaur par vibe thi Brazilian.

snippet.title: Old - Official Trailer [HD]
snippet.description:
Old
In Theaters July 23
https://www.old.movie

This summer, visionary filmmaker M. Night Shyamalan unveils a chilling, mysterious new thriller about a family on a tropical holiday who discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing for a few hours is somehow causing them to age rapidly … reducing their entire lives into a single day.

The film stars an impressive international cast including Golden Globe winner Gael García Bernal (Amazon’s Mozart in the Jungle), Vicky Krieps (Phantom Thread), Rufus Sewell (Amazon’s The Man in the High Castle), Ken Leung (Star Wars: Episode VII—The Force Awakens), Nikki Amuka-Bird (Jupiter Ascending), Abbey Lee (HBO’s Lovecraft Country), Aaron Pierre (Syfy’s Krypton), Alex Wolff (Hereditary), Embeth Davidtz (The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo), Eliza Scanlen (Little Women), Emun Elliott (Star Wars: Episode VII—The Force Awakens), Kathleen Chalfant (Showtime’s The Affair) and Thomasin McKenzie (Jojo Rabbit).

Old is a Blinding Edge Pictures production, directed and produced by M. Night Shyamalan, from his screenplay based on the graphic novel Sandcastle by Pierre Oscar Lévy and Frederik Peeters. The film is also produced by Ashwin Rajan (Glass, AppleTV+’s Servant) and Marc Bienstock (Glass, Split). The film’s executive producer is Steven Schneider.

ചിരിക്കാം? ചുമ്മാ ചിരിക്കാനല്ല...ഒരു ബംബർ ചിരിച്ചിരിക്കാൻ തയ്യാറായിക്കോ.

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की | Episode 138 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Vikas, Aarti, and Prakashi plan to throw Purvi out of the house. However, everyone gets shocked when Virendra comes to the rescue of Purvi. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3172 - Kya Champak Chacha Popatlal Ko Pehchan Payenge?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh

snippet.title: Instant Rava Dosa | सूजी का झटपट डोसा | How to make Rava Dosa | Sooji Dosa Recipe | Kabitaskitchen
snippet.description:
#RavaDosa #SoojiDosa #Kabitaskitcen 

Preparation time - 30 minutes
Serving - 4

Ingredients:
Rava or sooji (fine semolina)- 1/2 cup
Rice flour -1/2 cup
All purpose flour- 1/4 cup
Curd - 3 tbsp
Cumin seeds -1/2 tsp
Ginger (chopped)- 2 inch
Green chillies - 2
Chopped Onion - 1/2 cup
Curry leaves (chopped)- 1 tbsp
Cooking oil/ghee - 4 tbsp

snippet.title: How my Red Velvet Cake became a flop 😪 | Ishaani Krishna.
snippet.description:
#RedVelvetCakeGoneWrong #Flopcake #IshaaniKrishna

Okay so this is what happened...

I'm still only getting used to my oven.
I've not yet learnt to use it perfectly.
So there's this knob that comes below the temperature knob known as the "Function Select Knob".
I was supposed to put it at "Bake Mode", but I unknowingly set it at "Toast Mode" and thus my cake got slightly burnt or crispy (like bread toast) I'd say.
The recipe as such was actually correct 🥺

Okay bye 🥲

#RedVelvetCakeGoneWrong #Flopcake #IshaaniKrishna

Okay so this is what happened...

I'm still only getting used to my oven.
I've not yet learnt to use it perfectly.
So there's this knob that comes below the temperature knob known as the "Function Select Knob".
I was supposed to put it at "Bake Mode", but I unknowingly set it at "Toast Mode" and thus my cake got slightly burnt or crispy (like bread toast) I'd say.
The recipe as such was actually correct 🥺

Okay bye 🥲

snippet.description:

The one that believes the Vaccine will have serious side effects, or the one that believes the Covid vaccine can save our life? *నిత్యనూతనం.  పచ్చతోరణమై..  మలిదశలో.. సైతం తోడుగా నిలిచేదే.. ప్రేమ. 💖
*పెద్దవాళ్ళ లో.. వన్నెతరగని.. ప్రేమనే.. మన ఈ లాగేలాట పాటలో చూపించాము. తప్పకుండా ఆదరిస్తారని.. ఆశిస్తున్నాము.

en.title: Horizon Forbidden West - State of Play Gameplay Reveal | PS5
en.description: Join Aloy as she braves the Forbidden West, a deadly frontier that conceals mysterious new threats.

fr-FR.title: State of Play | Présentation du gameplay de Horizon Forbidden West
fr-FR.description:
Rejoignez-nous dès 18 h (heure de Paris) pour suivre un compte à rebours unique vers l'événement principal qui débutera à 23 h.

Rejoignez Aloy dans l'Ouest prohibé, un endroit mortel qui regorge de nouvelles menaces toutes plus mystérieuses les unes que les autres.

ru.title: State of Play | Игровой процесс Horizon Forbidden West
ru.description: Отправьтесь вместе с Элой в путешествие по опасному миру Запретного Запада, который скрывает новые загадочные угрозы.

pt-BR.title: State of Play | Revelação da Jogabilidade de Horizon Forbidden West
pt-BR.description: Junte-se a Aloy enquanto ela desbrava o Oeste Proibido, uma fronteira mortal que esconde novas ameaças misteriosas."

zh.title: State of Play | 全新《Horizon Forbidden West》遊戲畫面發表
zh.description: 跟隨亞蘿伊的腳步，一往無前，向危險邊疆西方禁地邁進，揭開種種未知的神秘威脅。

it.title: State of Play | Presentazione gameplay Horizon Forbidden West
it.description: Unisciti al viaggio di Aloy verso l'Ovest Proibito, una pericolosa frontiera che nasconde nuove e misteriose minacce.

fr.title: State of Play | Présentation du gameplay de Horizon Forbidden West
fr.description: Rejoignez Aloy dans l'Ouest prohibé, un endroit mortel qui regorge de nouvelles menaces toutes plus mystérieuses les unes que les autres.

es-ES.title: State of Play | Más Horizon Forbidden West en acción
es-ES.description: Acompaña a Aloy en su aventura por el Oeste Prohibido, una peligrosa tierra que depara nuevas y misteriosas amenazas.

es-MX.title: State of Play | Más Horizon Forbidden West en acción
es-MX.description: Únete a Aloy mientras desafía el Oeste Prohibido, una peligrosa frontera en la que se ocultan nuevas y misteriosas amenazas.

ja.title: State of Play | Horizon Forbidden Westゲームプレイ公開
ja.description: 『Horizon Forbidden West』で、アーロイは勇敢にも冒険へと旅立つ。危険に満ちたフロンティアへと向かうその道中で、謎めいた新たな脅威と遭遇する。

ko.title: State of Play | Horizon Forbidden West 게임플레이 공개
ko.description: 새롭고 신비로운 위협이 도사리고 있는 위험천만한 변방 지역인 포비든 웨스트를 에일로이와 함께 용감하게 탐험하세요.

de.title: State of Play | Horizon Forbidden West – Gameplay-Enthüllung
de.description: Begleite Aloy auf ihre gefährliche Reise durch den Verbotenen Westen, ein tödliches Grenzgebiet, in dem geheimnisvolle, neue Bedrohungen lauern.

snippet.title: Government Job Aspirants || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
Open your Upstox Gold Account - https://upstox.com/open-gold-account/?utm_source=influencer&utm_medium=organic&utm_term=NazarbattuMay21&f=G5LB

We all have seen government job aspirants around us. Indian parents' first career choice for their children in govt jobs.
right after intermediate, we start to think of which job to apply then we choose our graduation course. There are many funny and serious
stories around us. We have picked some of the types of students who prepare for govt. jobs. How they prepare for the competitive exams.
What problems did they face? What happens when they have to select the subject? which coaching to join. Similarly, there are many situations we came across. We have handpicked some of the most funniest situations among them.
Do share the video with your friends and family and spread the laughter in tough times. Thanks for watching.

Follow us on:- 
YouTube:- http://bit.ly/NazarBattu​
Facebook:- https://www.facebook.com/battunazar/​
Twitter:- https://www.twitter.com/nazar_battu​
Insta:- https://www.instagram.com/nazarbattuproductions

#GovernmentJob #LetsCrackIt #UPSC #NazarbattuAspirants

snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE-മമ്പുറം സ്വലാത്ത് തത്സമയം 27 - 05 - 2021 I 07:15 pm
snippet.description:
MAMPURAM MAQAM SWALATH MAJLIS I 20 - 05 - 2021
#mampurammaqam#swalath#live


മമ്പുറം മഖാമിലേക്ക് സ്വാഗതം .ദക്ഷിണേന്ത്യയിലെ പ്രധാന തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രമാണ് മമ്പുറം മഖാം. മലപ്പുറം ജില്ലയിലെ തിരൂരങ്ങാടി താലൂക്കിൽ,  സ്ഥിതി ചെയ്യുന്ന മഖാം ശരീഫിൽ അന്ത്യവിശ്രമം കൊള്ളുന്നത് കേരളീയ മുസ്‌ലിം ചരിത്രത്തിലും അധിനിവേശ വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടങ്ങളിലും ശ്രദ്ധേയ സാന്നിധ്യമായിരുന്ന ഖുഥ്ബുസ്സമാൻ സയ്യിദ് അലവി ബിൻ മുഹമ്മദ് ബിൻ സഹ്ൽ മൗലദ്ദവീല തങ്ങളും കുടുംബാംഗങ്ങളുമാണ്. യമനിലെ ഹള്‌റമൗത്തിൽ നിന്ന് ഇസ്‌ലാമിക പ്രബോധനാവശ്യാർത്ഥം മലബാറിലെത്തുകയും പിന്നീട് ഇവിടത്തെ മത-സാമൂഹിക-രാഷ്ട്രീയ മേഖലകളിൽ ശക്തമായ ഇടപെടലുകൾ നടത്തുകയും ചെയ്ത അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ ആത്മീയ തണൽ തേടി ജീവിത കാലത്തെന്ന പോലെ ജാതി-മത ഭേദമന്യെ അനേകായിരം തീർത്ഥാടകർ ഇവിടെ ഇപ്പോഴും എത്തിച്ചേരുന്നു.മമ്പുറം മഖാമിൽ നടക്കുന്ന പ്രധാന ചടങ്ങുകളിലൊന്നാണ് വ്യാഴാഴ്ച സ്വലാത്ത്.  മമ്പുറം തങ്ങളുടെ അമ്മാവനും ഭാര്യാപിതാവുമായ സയ്യിദ് ഹസൻ ബിൻ അലവി ജിഫ്‌രി തങ്ങളുടെ വിയോഗാനന്തരം മമ്പുറം തങ്ങൾ സ്ഥാപിച്ചതാണ് ഈ സ്വലാത്ത് മജ്ലിസ്.  
നേര്‍ച്ചകള്‍ക്കും സംഭാവനകള്‍ക്കും ബന്ധപ്പെടുക :  
+91 9996 313 786 (Help Line),
0494 2460 575, 
0494 2464 502 (Darul Huda).

Google Pay സൌകര്യം ലഭ്യമാണ്:
Number: +91 9996 313 786







Event Broadcasting: shahulbavu thurakkal

© Copyright : mampuram maqam

snippet.title: Jungle Cruise | Official Trailer 2
snippet.description:
This summer, join Dwayne Johnson and Emily Blunt on the adventure of a lifetime. 🚢 Watch the new trailer for Disney’s Jungle Cruise and see the movie in theaters or order it on Disney+ with Premier Access July 30. Additional Fee Required.

Inspired by the famous Disneyland theme park ride, Disney’s “Jungle Cruise” is an adventure-filled, rollicking thrill-ride down the Amazon with wisecracking skipper Frank Wolff and intrepid researcher Dr. Lily Houghton. Lily travels from London, England to the Amazon jungle and enlists Frank’s questionable services to guide her downriver on La Quila—his ramshackle-but-charming boat. Lily is determined to uncover an ancient tree with unparalleled healing abilities—possessing the power to change the future of medicine. Thrust on this epic quest together, the unlikely duo encounters innumerable dangers and supernatural forces, all lurking in the deceptive beauty of the lush rainforest. But as the secrets of the lost tree unfold, the stakes reach even higher for Lily and Frank and their fate—and mankind’s—hangs in the balance.
 
Jaume Collet-Serra directs the film, which stars Dwayne Johnson, Emily Blunt, Edgar Ramírez and Jack Whitehall, with Jesse Plemons, and Paul Giamatti. The producers are John Davis and John Fox of Davis Entertainment; Dwayne Johnson, Hiram Garcia and Dany Garcia of Seven Bucks Productions; and Beau Flynn of Flynn Picture Co., with Scott Sheldon and Doug Merrifield serving as executive producers. The story is by John Norville & Josh Goldstein and Glenn Ficarra & John Requa, and the screenplay is by Michael Green and Glenn Ficarra & John Requa. Disney’s “Jungle Cruise” releases in U.S. theaters and on Disney+ with Premier Access on July 30, 2021.         

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JungleCruise/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/JungleCruise
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disneysjunglecruise/
Hashtag: #JungleCruise

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 241
snippet.description:
Ragini sees her mother's portrait, bleed from the eyes. Swara tries to prove that the blood is fake. Ragini hears Lakshya talking to Mr Dass on the phone. She gets upset and questions him in anger.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 929 | 27th  May 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http:/a/www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 929 : The Rakhi Business
------------------------------------
 Jethalal finally agrees to give a loan of Rs. 15,000 to Bagha.Nattu Kaka stops Jethalal from entering his shop and Bagha reveals his new business to Jethalal. Since Rakhi festival is coming in three days he has brought a arrow full of rakhis. Jethalal gets tensed and starts worrying about his Rs. 15,000. Bagha visits Gokuldham society to sell his rocking Rakhis, and women buy it too. Society members are shocked to see Vanita and her daughter Gia in Gada house. Jethalal doubts Tapu.

 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की  | Episode 137 & 138 | Recap
snippet.description:
On learning that Vikas misbehaved with Purvi, an enraged Virendra decides to confront Vikas and teach him a lesson. Will Virendra hold back? Find out in this episode, on Voot!

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KugwSJL_LP3-WDgtLMI4Z13

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: கணவனை காலி செய்த புரோட்டா காதல்..! மாஸ்டருடன் சிக்கிய சலூன் கிரி | Crime
snippet.description:
கணவனை காலி செய்த புரோட்டா காதல்..! மாஸ்டருடன் சிக்கிய சலூன் கிரி

கோபிச்செட்டிபாளையம்:கணவனை கொலை செய்து மூச்சுத்திணறலால் இறந்ததாக நாடகம்

கணவனுக்கு பாலில் தூக்கமாத்திரை கலந்து கொடுத்து மனைவி செய்த சம்பவம்

மனைவியின் நடத்தையில் சந்தேகப்பட்டு கணவன் அடித்து உதைத்தால் வெறிச்செயல்

சமூக வலைதள நட்புக்கு ரெட்கார்டு போட்ட கணவனுக்கு பால் ஊற்றிய கொடூர மனைவி..!

கணவனை கொலை செய்ய ஆண் நண்பர்களிடம் யோசனை கேட்ட மனைவி

===================================

CA Inter Free Revision Course for May 2021 & Nov 2021 by Edu91: https://www.edu91.org/s/store/courses/description/ca-inter-revision-course-may2021-nov2021-edu91

====================

Hi Guys! The most awaited notification related to May 2021 exams has been released by ICAI today. 

May 2021 CA Intermediate/IPCC & Final exams have been postponed by the ICAI due to the pandemic situation in the country. Now in the latest announcement by ICAI, the institute has declared the updated exam date for CA IPCC ,CA Intermediate & CA Final May 2021 exams. 

ICAI Chartered Accountancy Intermediate/IPCC & Final Examinations for May 2021 will now commence from Monday, 5th July 2021. 

Detailed date sheet of CA Inter/IPCC & Final Exams for May 2021 will be announced by ICAI shortly. 

Stay connected with this page to know all the latest notifications & announcements issued by ICAI

All The Best For Your Exams!

Escape Room: Tournament of Champions is the sequel to the box office hit psychological thriller that terrified audiences around the world. In this installment, six people unwittingly find themselves locked in another series of escape rooms, slowly uncovering what they have in common to survive…and discovering they’ve all played the game before.
 
Directed by: 
Adam Robitel

snippet.title: 15 मिनट में मसाला डोसा बनाने की विधि - Instant Suji Se Masala Dosa Recipe CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, Suji se Instantly, 15 minute me Masala Dosa Banane ki Recipe le kar aaya hu, jarur bana ke try kariega..

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Suji Masala Dosa - Ingredients:
6-7 Dosa ke lie
Suji - 1 cup
Besan - 1 tbsp
Gehu ka Atta - 1 tbsp
Namak - taste hisab se
Dahi - 1 cup
Pani - batter banane ke lie
Baking Soda - 1/4 tsp
Oil - Dosa sekne ke lie

Oil - 1 tbsp
Sarso - 1 tsp
Chana dal - 1 tbsp
Curry Leaves - 8-10
Hari Mirch - 1
Ginger - 1 inch
Pyaaz - 1 slices, large size ke
Salt - to taste
Haldi Powder - 1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - 1/4 tsp
Aloo - 5 (boiled, peeled, chopped)
Hara Dhania - 2 tbsp

Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: Beintehaa | बेइंतहा  | Episode 86
snippet.description:
Aaliya's pregnancy reports are negative. Instead of being relieved, she is upset to shatter her family's expectations. Barkat asks Zain to take Aaliya out on a date where Zain is unable to express his feelings.

#ColorsRishtey #Beintehaa

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bz305EPP9BgtWQrII2sK2gv

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

The series revolves around the lives of Zain and Aliya, two lovers whose families are sworn enemies. What happens when the past of your family members haunts your future with your loved one? Can real love triumph over family rivalry?
